config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap jadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu ditempatkan di atasnya, itu mudah sekali berubah jadi pembenaran untuk menindas orang yang lemah atau berbeda pendapat. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tapi seharusnya dicapai tanpa mengorbankan martabat, kebebasan, dan perlindungan dasar tiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari penghormatan kuat terhadap hak individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the individual, because that logic can easily be used to silence dissent and excuse abuse of power. From my perspective in China, I understand why people emphasize social stability, public order, and collective welfare, since these are often treated as essential for development and avoiding chaos. But if individual rights are always secondary, then minorities, whistleblowers, and ordinary citizens can be sacrificed too easily in the name of the “greater good.” A healthy society needs balance, and I would put basic rights as the hard boundary that society should not cross.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Indonesia saya melihat alasan “demi umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan ketidakadilan. Memang ada situasi tertentu, seperti darurat kesehatan atau bencana, ketika pembatasan hak bisa diterima, tetapi itu harus jelas, proporsional, dan tidak melanggar hak dasar secara sewenang-wenang. Kalau hak individu terus-menerus dianggap nomor dua, yang paling rentan justru makin mudah dikorbankan oleh mayoritas atau penguasa. Bagi saya, kepentingan masyarakat dan hak individu harus saling membatasi, bukan saling menelan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text:
I do not believe the interests of society should generally take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why many people value stability, order, and collective goals, because those priorities can help a country avoid chaos and improve living standards. But I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can become a blanket excuse to ignore due process, silence criticism, or treat vulnerable people as expendable.

The strongest point in the other side is that society sometimes does need temporary limits on individual freedom in emergencies, but those limits must be narrow, transparent, and accountable. Without firm rights as a baseline, “society’s interests” are too vague and too easy for power holders to define for themselves. For me, the better principle is that society and individuals should be balanced, with basic rights as the non-negotiable floor, not something society can override whenever it wants.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman saya melihat konteks Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menekan kritik, mengabaikan minoritas, atau melindungi kekuasaan dari akuntabilitas. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti bencana atau wabah yang menuntut pembatasan sementara, tetapi itu harus ketat, proporsional, dan bisa diawasi. Tanpa batas yang jelas dari hak individu, kepentingan masyarakat sangat mudah berubah jadi alasan untuk ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual in general. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people stress order, stability, and collective goals, because those things can matter a lot in real life, but I have also seen how easily “for the public interest” can be used to weaken due process and silence criticism. The strongest argument for society comes in emergencies, yet even then the limits on rights should be temporary, narrow, and accountable. If basic rights are not the floor, then “society’s interests” become too vague and too easy for those in power to define however they want.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
